name: Thai Rice Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a large pot. Add noodles and cook until soft, about 4 to 5 minutes. Drain and set aside.
2. Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat for 1 minute. Add garlic and ginger, stirring fry for 1 minute.
3. Add cabbage and stir fry until tender crisp. Stir in noodles, bean sprouts, scallions, tamari, and pepper. Cook until heated through.
4. Mix in basil leaves. Garnish with peanuts and lime wedges. Serve hot.
